scripts.build: pip3 install pygbag==0.9.3 --break-system-packages && python3 -m pygbag --disable-sound-format-error --build game && python3 -c "import pygbag, os, shutil; src=os.path.join(os.path.dirname(pygbag.__file__), 'paka', 'static'); dest='game/build/web'; [shutil.copy(os.path.join(src, f), dest) for f in os.listdir(src) if os.path.isfile(os.path.join(src, f))]" && sed -i 's|https://pygame-web.github.io/cdn/0.9.3/||g' game/build/web/index.html
